terms.data: Recorded moments — what happened, written down as rows.
terms.feature: A clue you can measure, like how long a film is or how upbeat it feels.
terms.label: The answer you wish you knew ahead of time — love or skip, stars, genre.
terms.train: Practice round — the app adjusts using films you've already seen.
terms.test: Blind taste test — films held back so you can't cheat while tuning.
terms.accuracy: Out of every guess, how many were right.
terms.loss: A single number for how wrong the guesses are — lower is better.
terms.overfitting: Memorizing homework answers instead of learning the idea.
terms.underfitting: Using a rule too simple to capture the pattern.
terms.neighbor: The closest past examples — like asking friends with similar taste.
